hypothesis: Fine-tuning GPT-4o on the Corral framework’s structured tool docstrings and example task–tool interaction traces will enable the fine-tuned model, using only the original Spectra toolset, to achieve a pass@5 on the Spectra single-task benchmark that is statistically indistinguishable from the pass@5 achieved by the un-fine-tuned GPT-4o when augmented with the specialized hypothesis-generator tool.
